---
name: Bug report
about: Report a reproducible Atlas trust-surface defect with metadata-only detail
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the observed defect and the expected behavior.

## Affected Surface

- [ ] CLI command
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Schema
- [ ] Test
- [ ] CI / GitHub Actions
- [ ] Release-trust or reviewer evidence

## Reproduction

Use synthetic or public metadata only.

```text
command or steps here
```

## Evidence

Include paths, command output summaries, hashes, or screenshots only if they do
not contain secrets or raw private evidence.

## Boundary Check

- [ ] No credentials, tokens, passwords, private keys, or session cookies
- [ ] No raw target data, customer data, packet captures, request bodies, or
      response bodies
- [ ] No exploit payloads or instructions for unauthorized access
